Intercom | The only helpdesk designed for the AI Agent era The only helpdesk designed for the AI Agent era Intercom is the only helpdesk with a natively integrated AI Agent , Fin , meaning every customer conversation improves the next one, enabling perfect experiences that were never possible before. Start free trial View demo Fully-featured helpdesk Natively integrated AI Agent AI-powered Insights Self-improving system A complete solution for AI and human agents Intercom and Fin are built together, so you have full visibility across your entire operation, and your team and Fin can collaborate seamlessly to deliver perfect customer experiences. Start free trial View demo AI-powered agent workspace With an omnichannel inbox, AI-powered ticketing, and real-time assistance from Copilot, your human team has everything they need to onboard faster, work more efficiently, and deliver better customer experiences. A seamless experience for customers and agents A single solution means Fin and your human team work from the same customer record, so handoffs have full context, no one switches between tools, and every customer gets a consistent, seamless experience. AI-powered Insights across every interaction Our AI engine automatically scores and organizes every conversation across Fin and your human team, so you always understand quality, can spot emerging trends, and get alerted to what matters. Learn more A self-improving system Fin constantly improves by learning from your best human reps, and suggestions and assistance from Fin make your human team better. With everything in one system, managers get Recommendations on what to fix, from missing content to data integrations, and can act on them with one click. Fin AI Agent A world-class AI Agent Fin is a world-class AI Agent trusted by many of the most forward-thinking businesses in the world, including Anthropic , Clay , Lightspeed , Rocket Money , Gamma , and many more . Learn more " If you’re debating whether to build your own AI solution or buy one, as a fast-growing company in a complex space, my advice would be to buy – and specifically, buy Fin. " Isabel Larrow Product Support Operations at Anthropic A fully-featured AI-powered helpdesk Intercom has every feature your team needs to resolve queries faster, deliver personalized service, engage proactively, and continuously improve your customer experience. Start free trial View demo Resolve queries faster Copilot Give every agent an AI assistant that pulls context from past conversations, surfaces instant answers from your knowledge base, and drafts replies, so your team resolves more queries, faster. Learn more AI-enhanced ticketing Convert any conversation into a ticket with one click, automatically categorized, prioritized, and routed to the right team, so every issue reaches the right person, with full context. Learn more No code automations Build powerful automations to route conversations, manage SLAs, and configure escalation triggers, without any engineering support. Copilot + - Give every agent an AI assistant that pulls context from past conversations, surfaces instant answers from your knowledge base, and drafts replies, so your team resolves more queries, faster. Learn more AI-enhanced ticketing + - Convert any conversation into a ticket with one click, automatically categorized, prioritized, and routed to the right team, so every issue reaches the right person, with full context. No code automations + - Build powerful automations to route conversations, manage SLAs, and configure escalation triggers, without any engineering support. Deliver tailored experiences across every channel Omnichannel Bring every conversation across email, chat, phone, WhatsApp, and social apps into one inbox, so your team works from one place and every customer gets a consistent experience regardless of how they reach out. Learn more Live customer intelligence Access rich, real-time records for every user and company, with conversation history, behavioral data, and custom attributes, giving Fin and your human team everything they need to deliver personal, tailored service. Apps and integrations Connect Intercom to over 350 integrations out of the box, including Salesforce, Stripe, and Jira, with powerful, flexible APIs for everything else, all quick to set up and easy to maintain. Learn more Engage customers at the right moment Onboarding tools Onboard customers with interactive product tours, checklists, and in-app tooltips, so they get up to speed faster and get more value from your product, all without contacting support. Learn more Proactive notifications Keep customers informed about new features, known issues, and policy changes with in-product messages, mobile push notifications, and banners. Learn more Targeted messaging sequences Build omnichannel message journeys with a no-code visual builder, targeting customers precisely based on live behavioral data, product usage, and custom attributes. Learn more Onboarding tools + - Onboard customers with interactive product tours, checklists, and in-app tooltips, so they get up to speed faster and get more value from your product, all without contacting support. Learn more Proactive notifications + - Keep customers informed about new features, known issues, and policy changes with in-product messages, mobile push notifications, and banners. Targeted messaging sequences + - Build omnichannel message journeys with a no-code visual builder, targeting customers precisely based on live behavioral data, product usage, and custom attributes. Monitor and improve every interaction Insights The only solution with 100% coverage across your entire support operation, giving you actionable insights into what customers are asking, how they feel, and what's changing, with CX Score, Topics Explorer, and Trends. Learn more Always-on QA Monitor every AI and human conversation in real time, with AI-powered scoring against your custom standards and instant alerts the moment quality drops. Learn more Reporting Access pre-built reports covering every support use case, and a fully customizable report builder with advanced filters and chart visualisations. Learn more Insights + - The only solution with 100% coverage across your entire support operation, giving you actionable insights into what customers are asking, how they feel, and what's changing, with CX Score, Topics Explorer, and Trends. Learn more Always-on QA + - Monitor every AI and human conversation in real time, with AI-powered scoring against your custom standards and instant alerts the moment quality drops. Reporting + - Access pre-built reports covering every support use case, and a fully customizable report builder with advanced filters and chart visualisations. " Our Lightspeed customer service agents are dramatically more efficient when using Copilot. In testing, agents using Copilot were able to close 31% more customer conversations daily. " Angelo Livanos Senior Director of Global Support at Lightspeed at Lightspeed A true partner with deep domain expertise We partner with you to set up and scale industry-leading customer experiences, with deep domain expertise, thought leadership, and education to give your team an edge The company you can trust Intercom is built for security, reliability, and transparency, meeting leading compliance standards. Learn more Expert support, at every stage Intercom's Success and Services teams give you direct access to the experts behind the product, so you can launch and scale with confidence. Learn more The AI Agent Blueprint A practical guide to launching and scaling AI in customer service, built from real-world experience and best practices. Learn more " I truly believe that the way the Intercom team has supported us is one of the most inspiring examples of strong customer success that I've seen. " George Dilthey Head of Support at Clay Transparent pricing Intercom with Fin Combine Intercom with Fin for a single, fully integrated customer service platform. $29 Per Seat/Mo + $0.99 Per Outcome Learn more Perfect customer experiences, powered by Intercom Start free trial View demo

[PAGE: /about]
About | Intercom blank blank blank blank blank Skip to content The complete automated and human customer service solution Our company Strong customer relationships are more important than ever. But the scale and nature of online business, combined with rising customer expectations, makes it difficult to build—and keep—those connections. That's why we're here. Customer service and support teams at more than 25,000 businesses use Intercom's complete customer service solution every day to drive faster growth through better relationships. Heading is Required 25 k+ paying customers 2011 Founded 8 x Forbes Cloud 100 Honoree San Francisco 55 2nd Street, 4th Floor, San Francisco, CA 94105 London 9th Floor, The Warehouse, 211 Old St, London EC1V 9NR, United Kingdom Chicago 1330 W. Fulton Market, Suite 750, Chicago, IL 60607 Dublin 124 St Stephen's Green, Dublin 2, D02 C628 Sydney 285A Crown St. Surry Hills NSW 2010, Australia, 1st Floor Sydney Berlin Floor 7, Zimmerstrasse 78, Berlin 10117 Press Highlights Restarting the start-up: Why Eoghan McCabe returned to lead Intercom Read the article The 6 next big things in enterprise technology Read the article Intercom’s AI Evolution Read the article Cutting through the noise to get to the reality of customer service AI Read the article Our leadership Eoghan McCabe, CEO and Chairman of the Board Eoghan is CEO, co-founder and Chairman of the Board at Intercom. Before Intercom he founded Contrast, a software design consultancy, and Exceptional, a developer tool company acquired by Rackspace. Read Eoghan's full bio Des Traynor, Chief Strategy Officer & Co-founder Des leads R&D, including Product, Engineering, and Design. Previously, he co-founded Exceptional, and was a UX designer for web apps. Read Des's full bio Paul Adams, Chief Product Officer Paul is Intercom’s Chief Product Officer, leading the Product Management, Product Design, Data Science, and Research teams. He previously held leadership, product and design roles at Facebook, Google and Dyson. Read Paul's full bio Archana Agrawal, President Archana leads Intercom’s go-to-market teams, including Sales, Marketing, Success, and Support. She previously held marketing leadership roles at Airtable and Atlassian, most recently as CMO at Airtable. Read Archana's full bio Lauren Cullen, SVP, People Lauren is the SVP of People at Intercom, leading the People Operations, Total Rewards, People Programs, Business Partners, Recruitment, and Real Estate and Workplace teams. She previously held HR roles at Twitter and Google. Read Lauren's full bio Darragh Curran, Chief Technology Officer Darragh leads Intercom’s engineering team. Previously, he worked at Amazon and software design consultancy Contrast. Read Darragh's full bio Dan Griggs, Chief Financial Officer Dan leads Intercom’s Finance, Accounting, Business Ops, and Analytics teams to optimize Intercom’s growth. He was previously CFO of Sitecore. Read Dan's full bio Ciaran Lee, Chief Engineer and Co-founder Ciaran served as CTO from founding in 2011 until 2021, when he left to pursue other interests. He returned in 2023 as Chief Engineer. Read Ciaran's full bio Our board of directors Eoghan McCabe, Chairman Eoghan is CEO, co-founder and Chairman of the Board at Intercom. Before Intercom he founded Contrast, a software design consultancy, and Exceptional, a developer tool company acquired by Rackspace. Read Eoghan's full bio Des Traynor Des co-founded Intercom and leads the R&D team, including Product, Engineering, and Design. Previously, he co-founded Exceptional, and was a UX designer for web apps. Cameron Deatsch Cameron was the Chief Revenue Officer at Atlassian from 2020 to 2023, where he ran the marketing, sales, and support organizations. Read Cameron's full bio Abhijeet Dwivedi Abhijeet is part of OpenAI where he works on special projects. Previously he was co-founder and CEO of ZeroDown and Central and COO and CSO at Zenefits. Read Abhijeet's full bio Talia Goldberg Talia is a partner in Bessemer’s San Francisco office and invests across software and consumer companies. She supports teams that leverage AI to progress the way we live and work. Read Talia's full bio Eileen Naughton Eileen serves as an advisor and board member. She retired from Google in June 2021 as Chief People Officer and a member of Google’s executive leadership team. Read Eileen's full bio Bobby Pinero Bobby Pinero is the CEO and Co-Founder of Equals. Bobby was previously the Senior Director of Finance & Analytics at Intercom from October 2013 to March 2021. Read Bobby's full bio Our investors

[PAGE: /pricing]
Intercom Pricing | Plans for every team size Get Fin and Intercom for a single, fully integrated customer service platform Fin million dollar guarantee Billed annually Billed monthly Our Fin AI Agent + Intercom plans Essential Includes Fin AI Agent The customer support plan for individuals, startups, and small businesses. $0.99 per Fin outcome $29 per seat/mo Start free trial Key features include Fin AI Agent · $0.99 per outcome Messenger Shared inbox and ticketing system Pre-built reports Public help center View all features Advanced Includes Fin AI Agent Powerful automation tools and AI features for growing support teams. $0.99 per Fin outcome $85 per seat/mo Start free trial Get a demo Every Essential feature, plus Multiple team Inboxes Workflows automation builder Round robin assignment Private and multilingual Help Center Includes 20 free Lite seats View all features Expert Includes Fin AI Agent Collaboration, security, and multibrand features for large support teams. $0.99 per Fin outcome $132 per seat/mo Start free trial Get a demo Every Advanced feature, plus SSO & identity management HIPAA support Service level agreements (SLAs) Multibrand Messenger / Help Center Includes 50 free Lite seats View all features All plans include free, unlimited live-chat, support email, in-app chats, banners, and tooltips. Pay-as-you-go for email campaigns, SMS, WhatsApp, and Phone. View channel pricing Already have a helpdesk? Fin AI Agent Use Fin with your current helpdesk including Salesforce and more. $0.99 per Fin outcome No seats required Start free trial Get a demo Features include Set up in under an hour on your current helpdesk Answers email, live chat, phone and more Customizable tone & answer length Takes action on external systems Hands off to agents in preferred Inbox All plans include free, unlimited live-chat, support email, in-app chats, banners, and tooltips. Pay-as-you-go for email campaigns, SMS, WhatsApp, and Phone. View channel pricing Add-ons Included in your free trial. Add or remove anytime. Pro AI features for visibility and control across every conversation. Includes CX Score, Topics, Recommendations, Monitors, and Custom Scorecards. $99 /mo Includes analysis of 1,000 conversations/mo Learn more Copilot Increase agent efficiency with a personal AI assistant in the inbox. Free to use in 10 Copilot and 10 AI Auto-translation conversations per agent/mo. $29 per agent/mo Unlimited usage Learn more Proactive Support Plus Advanced in-app and outbound support features including Posts, Checklists, Product Tours, Surveys, and Series campaign builder. $99 /mo Includes 500 messages sent/mo Learn more Get an estimate based on your needs Find the right plan for your team Get an estimated cost for Intercom’s AI-first customer service platform—based on your team size, expected Fin outcomes, and more. Calculate costs See the impact Fin could have on your business Estimate how much time and money Fin could save your team—based on your current and future support volume. Calculate savings Start-ups get 90% off Get a direct line to your customers with best-in-class support. Apply now Thousands of businesses have already seen transformational results Linktree Robin Synthesia " Within six days, Fin is successfully resolving 42% of conversations. It’s truly surpassed my expectations. " Dane Burgess Customer Support Director at Linktree " The numbers speak for themselves. We’re seeing a 50% resolution rate with Fin, which is pretty amazing! " Ben Peak Director, Technical Support at Robin " Within six months, Fin had resolved over 6,000 conversations, saved the team over 1,300 hours and pushed self-serve support rates as high as 87%. " " Within six days, Fin is successfully resolving 42% of conversations. It’s truly surpassed my expectations. " Dane Burgess Customer Support Director at Linktree " The numbers speak for themselves. We’re seeing a 50% resolution rate with Fin, which is pretty amazing! " Ben Peak Director, Technical Support at Robin " Within six months, Fin had resolved over 6,000 conversations, saved the team over 1,300 hours and pushed self-serve support rates as high as 87%. " FAQ's How does Intercom pricing work? Intercom pricing has two components: Seats: You pay per teammate based on your plan (Essential, Advanced, Expert) Usage: You pay for what you use (e.g. Fin outcomes, messaging channels) All plans include access to Intercom’s helpdesk and Fin AI Agent. How is Fin AI Agent priced? Fin is priced at $0.99 per outcome . An outcome is counted when: A customer confirms their issue is resolved, or They don’t ask for more help after Fin responds, or Fin completes a workflow (Procedure), including handoffs You’re only charged once per conversation, even if multiple questions are answered. Can I use Fin with my existing helpdesk? Yes. Fin can be used with tools like Salesforce and others. Pricing: $0.99 per outcome Minimum monthly commitment applies (e.g. 50 outcomes) No seat costs No setup, integration, or platform fees What plans does Intercom offer? Intercom offers three plans: Essential Advanced Expert Your plan determines: Seat price Feature access Included capabilities (e.g. Lite seats on higher tiers) What is a seat (Full vs Lite)? Full seat: Paid. Required for teammates who interact with customers and use core features. Lite seat: Free (on Advanced/Expert). Limited access for internal collaboration. Only Full seats can send messages or fully use features like outbound content. Are there additional usage charges? Yes. Beyond seats, pricing is usage-based for certain features: Fin AI Agent — $0.99 per outcome WhatsApp — Charged per conversation (varies by volume/direction) SMS — Charged per message (varies by region) Email campaigns — Charged per bulk email sent Phone — Usage-based (varies) Inbound support (e.g. responding to customer emails) is included. What is Proactive Support Plus? An optional add-on for outbound engagement. $99/month includes 500 messages Covers: Product Tours, Surveys, In-app messages, Mobile Push, Carousels Additional messages are charged per unit Do I need a contract? No. Monthly or annual self-serve plans are available (Essential, Advanced) Contracts are optional and required for: Enterprise needs Premier Support / onboarding Custom terms What’s the minimum to get started? 1 Full seat minimum No required platform fees beyond that Usage (e.g. Fin, messaging) is pay-as-you-go This makes it easy to start small and scale. Is there a free trial? Yes. 14-day free trial No credit card required Includes all features, Fin, and add-ons You only pay once you choose a plan and add payment details. How do I change my plan or seats? You can: Upgrade/downgrade plans Add/remove seats Add or remove add-ons Handled directly in your workspace (or via Sales if under contract). Downgrades typically take effect at renewal. Are there discounts available? Yes. Startups: Up to 90% off + 1 year of Fin free (via Early Stage program ) Enterprise discounts may be available via Sales Perfect customer experiences, powered by Intercom Start free trial View demo
